title: orchis × cortesii
intro: Orchis × cortesii is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, resulting from the cross between the Italian orchid (Orchis italica) and the autumn lady's tresses (Spiranthes aestivalis). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Orchis × cortesii include its potential to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, skin irritations, and digestive problems, as well as its ability to boost energy and vitality. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
